title: Fixed Flow + Bolt Trim
description:
this pack aims to fix the textures of the boots on the flow and bolt armor trims.
Both flow and bolt have a missing texture for the inside of the boots, this pack fixes that and adds textures to the inside of said boots.
body: This texture pack is a vanilla fix texture pack where the boots of the Flow and Bolt armor trim have their textures fixed, in vanilla the inside of the boots on both trims have a missing texture, so with this texture pack i added those.
